identity.title: Going Crazy (Hiligaynon Fusion Mix)
identity.styleSentence: A high-energy alternative rock K-pop fusion track at 148 BPM featuring tightly edited saturated guitars with precise double-tracking, a polished drum sound layered with samples and controlled room ambience, focused side-chained synth bass for clean low-end, and a glossy modern vocal mix that emphasizes intimate details on the passionate female lead while delivering expressive male rap-sung sections within densely stacked harmonies.
identity.vocalStyle: Passionate female lead with wide emotional range and dynamic swells, mixed with clear enunciation on expressive male rap-sung sections.

lyrics.text:
You got me going crazy
Lose control, maybe
Crazy
You got me going crazy
Still this love or hate, don't know why
Am I just stuck in a race, baby
One more call and I might just die
Every night I'm falling, I fall through
Got me going crazy
Blanket, emo, ghost in a dance
Got hoonah, hoonah, don't need to boost now
Better get up on your dog, I get
You got me going crazy
Crazy
Crazy
Crazy
Yeah,
late night drive, city glow
Booking lights and your name on my phone
I know you're like a poison dose
When I look in your eyes, I can't say no
Get you closer, then you fade again
Run away, but you still drag me in
Change my mind, but I still pretend
Erase you, but I always crave you still
Bass hitting and you're right back fast
All my friends telling me fall back
Noisy nights with the volume up
In my ears, I hear you, nigga, say I was slow
Drunk on you, yes, dangerous
But I'm still ego-favorite
Go break it down, then we save this love
Wake up and I'm shouting this
Round and round
We're like a couple, oh, and yeah
You never slow down
Till we burn, now we just go
We burn it up
Must end, oh, man, then we fall again
Then we fall back down
But we rise in this time
You got me going crazy
Still this love or hate, don't know why
Much as I can't erase, baby
One more call and I might just die
Every night I'm falling, I fall through
You got me going crazy
I've run, got emo, ghost, my dance
Got who, now, who, not done, it's a pusla
But I'll get up, I ain't done, I could get
You got me going crazy
Crazy
Crazy
Crazy
See my text and you let it stay
Acting fine while I laugh with my friends
But when I see your name poppin'
I know how this will end
I fall again
Come a little kicker, where to find me?
Under neon, you pull up to me
Hands sliding down my waist so slow
Every lie that you tell just fades with the glow
All the reasons I still want you
That one night, man, I'll holler more
Finger tracing down my brown skin
I don't wanna listen to your voice come in
Don't say you love me, I tell you
Tonight, let me be honest and true
I don't need forever with you
Just heart me right now, are you with me?
You got me going crazy
Still this love or hate, don't know why
Heart is racing, can't stop it, baby
One more call and I might just die
Every night I fall and I fall for you
You got me going crazy
I'm like a ghost in a dance
I'm like a ghost in a dance
I'm like a ghost in a dance
You got me going crazy
Crazy
Crazy
Crazy
You got me going crazy
I don't gotta be looking up or gone
You got me going crazy
Brooklyn to Philippines,
still you
You got me going crazy

analysis.summary: The song portrays a volatile relationship where the narrator is consumed by intense desire and confusion between love and hate, oscillating between addiction to the partner's presence and a desperate need for escape.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Confused awakening, sudden realization of chaos.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Fingers trembling over a steering wheel in darkness, shattering glass reflecting red taillights.
A foggy street sign where the letters are flickering and indistinct against rain-slicked asphalt.
A kaleidoscope view of a city street where buildings are tilting and neon signs blur into streaks.
A translucent figure dancing alone in an empty subway station, illuminated by cold blue overhead lights.
A phoenix made of shattered glass shards soaring upwards through a stormy sky.
Two mirrors reflecting distorted, angry faces arguing in an empty hallway with flickering lights.
A beautiful glass vial shattering on a marble floor, dark liquid spreading rapidly across the surface.
Heavy rain pouring inside a sealed room, water droplets distorting reflections of smiling faces in windows.
Flames licking up the side of a skyscraper at night, illuminating silhouettes holding hands tightly.
A bright light bulb dimming rapidly until only a faint shadow remains against a black wall.
A cracked smartphone screen displaying a fake profile picture next to a real tear stain.
An hourglass with no sand left, sitting on a table surrounded by scattered letters and photos.

sections.name: Drop/Build-Up
sections.emotion: Raw honesty in the heat of the moment.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Mouth wide open screaming into a microphone that is sparking with electrical energy.
A mechanical heart beating rapidly inside an iron cage, wires connecting to city power lines.
Confetti exploding in a dark room mixed with shattered mirrors and flickering neon signs.
A hand clutching a phone tightly as the screen cracks from impact, background burning with orange fire.
Leaves swirling violently down an escalator into a dark abyss of smoke and debris.
A beautiful glass vial shattering on a marble floor, dark liquid spreading rapidly across the surface.
Flames licking up the side of a skyscraper at night, illuminating silhouettes holding hands tightly.
A bright light bulb dimming rapidly until only a faint shadow remains against a black wall.

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)
